base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of objects_pillar_skewer_etc — a tile from 1990 super mario world. Big objects — pillars, skewer-traps, ball-and-chain, stretch-blocks, P-switches. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Big objects — pillars, skewer-traps, ball-and-chain, stretch-blocks, P-switches
